subcodes.title: Kitab al-Ruh (Book of the Spirit)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath revealed the verses in truth unto His servant, that perchance mankind might believe in the signs of their Lord. Follow that which We have revealed unto thee [3.5s]... ...This Book is a Dhikr (Remembrance) from God according to the Decree of a wondrous servant [the Bāb]. He is assuredly the True One within the heavens and the earth.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی قد نزل الايات بالحق الي عبده لعل الناس بايات ربک يومنون ان اتبع ما اوحينا اليک
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Word of God is its own standard, @transcendence; unknowability of God
